name: Create Project
description: Create a new project with name and description.

name: List Projects
description: Get a list of all projects.

name: List Project by ID
description: Get all project data by ID

name: List Components by Project ID
description: Get all components that belong to a project using the project ID

name: List Contributors by Project ID
description: Get all contributors that belong to a project using the project ID

name: Get User by ID
description: Get user data by ID (id, username, created_at, component creations).

name: Get Your Own User Info
description: Get user data by requesting with authentication headers. Only your own data, e.g. for the profile page.

name: Register User
description: Register a new user with username and password.

name: Login User
description: Authenticate user and receive a JWT token.

name: Create Component
description: Create a new component for a project. Requires authentication and project ownership.

name: Get All Components
description: Retrieve all components from the database.

name: Get Component By ID
description: Retrieve a single component by its ID.

name: Delete Component
description: Delete a component by ID. Requires authentication and component ownership.

name: Add Contributor
description: Adds a new contributor to a project. Only the project owner can add contributors.

name: Get All Contributors
description: Fetches a list of all contributors across all projects.

name: Get User Contributors
description: Fetches all contributions for a specific user by their user ID.

name: Remove Contributor
description: Removes a contributor from a project. Only the project owner can remove contributors.
